sizing_rule.note: Trade at full optimal f levels using active equity (closed equity + open equity at market value minus inactive amount). Recalculate and rebalance position size daily as equity changes. Author does not specify optimal f value or kelly fraction—these must be derived from historical drawdown analysis.

source_rule_text: Calculate position size based on active equity (total equity minus inactive amount) and trade at full f levels, recalculating daily as equity changes.
